From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/cf/NRHP_USA_Map.svg/250px-NRHP_USA_Map.svg.png)](/wiki/File:NRHP_USA_Map.svg)

The concentration of NRHP listings throughout the contiguous U.S. by county

The [National Register of Historic Places](/wiki/National_Register_of_Historic_Places "National Register of Historic Places") in the United States is a register including [buildings](/wiki/Property_type_(National_Register_of_Historic_Places)#Building "Property type (National Register of Historic Places)"), [sites](/wiki/Property_type_(National_Register_of_Historic_Places)#Site "Property type (National Register of Historic Places)"), [structures](/wiki/Property_type_(National_Register_of_Historic_Places)#Structure "Property type (National Register of Historic Places)"), [districts](/wiki/Property_type_(National_Register_of_Historic_Places)#Historic_districts "Property type (National Register of Historic Places)"), and [objects](/wiki/Property_type_(National_Register_of_Historic_Places)#Object "Property type (National Register of Historic Places)"). The Register automatically includes all [National Historic Landmarks](/wiki/National_Historic_Landmark "National Historic Landmark") as well as all historic areas administered by the U.S. [National Park Service](/wiki/National_Park_Service "National Park Service"). Since its introduction in 1966, more than 95,000 separate listings have been added to the register.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Current listings by state and territory

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=United_States_National_Register_of_Historic_Places_listings&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Current listings by state and territory")]

The following are approximate tallies of current listings by state and territory on the National Register of Historic Places. These counts are based on entries in the National Register Information Database as of August 16, 2025,[[2]](#cite_note-nris-2) and new weekly listings posted since then on the National Register of Historic Places website.[[3]](#cite_note-3) There are frequent additions to the listings and occasional delistings and the counts here are approximate and not official. New entries are added to the official Register on a weekly basis.[[4]](#cite_note-4) Also, the counts in this table exclude boundary increase and decrease listings which modify the area covered by an existing property or district and which carry a separate National Register reference number. The numbers of NRHP listings in each state are documented by tables in each of the individual state list articles.
